tests.title: ReportsService getDhisDashboard() returns eligibleLinkages = 0 when linkedThisMonth < 100
ReportsService getDhisDashboard() calculates eligibleLinkages = linkedThisMonth - 100 when above threshold
ReportsService getDhisDashboard() calculates dhisIncomeInr = eligibleLinkages × 20
ReportsService getDhisDashboard() returns eligibleLinkages = 0 (not negative) when linkedThisMonth is exactly 100
ReportsService getDhisDashboard() returns linkagesNeededForEligibility = 0 when already eligible
ReportsService getDhisDashboard() returns correct linkagesNeededForEligibility when below threshold
ReportsService getDhisDashboard() includes last6Months array in the response
ReportsService getDhisDashboard() returns correct dhisThreshold constant of 100
ReportsService getDhisDashboard() returns correct incentivePerLinkageInr constant of 20
ReportsService getRevenueSummary() calculates totalBilled as sum of all bill totalAmounts
ReportsService getRevenueSummary() calculates totalCollected as sum of paidAmount
ReportsService getRevenueSummary() calculates totalOutstanding as sum of dueAmount
ReportsService getRevenueSummary() returns billCount equal to number of bills found
ReportsService getRevenueSummary() returns zeros when no bills exist
ReportsService getVisitStats() returns total visit count for the facility
ReportsService getVisitStats() returns inRange count for the date window
ReportsService getVisitStats() includes byStatus breakdown in response
ReportsService getPatientStats() returns totalPatients count
ReportsService getPatientStats() returns newPatientsInRange count for the date window
ReportsService getEquipmentUtilisation() returns total equipment count and active lease count
ReportsService getEquipmentUtilisation() includes byStatus array in response
DoctorService createConsultation() serializes diagnoses array to a JSON string

DoctorService createConsultation() leaves diagnoses undefined when not provided

DoctorService completeConsultation() throws NotFoundException when consultation is not found
DoctorService completeConsultation() merges dto fields onto the consultation
DoctorService finalizePrescription() sets status to FINALIZED and saves
DoctorService finalizePrescription() throws NotFoundException when prescription is not found
DoctorService getPrescription() throws NotFoundException when no prescription exists for the visit
DoctorService getPrescription() returns prescription with items when found
DoctorService getPrescription() returns empty items array when prescription has no items
DoctorService searchIcd10() queries both code and description with LIKE pattern
DoctorService searchIcd10() returns an empty array when no matches are found
DoctorService searchIcd10() limits results to 20 entries
DoctorService getCommonIcd10() queries only codes marked as isCommon with limit 50
DoctorService getCommonIcd10() returns the list of common ICD-10 codes
DoctorService createPrescription() sets prescribedById and prescriptionDate
DoctorService updateConsultation() serializes diagnoses and saves updated consultation
DoctorService updateConsultation() throws NotFoundException when consultation is not found
FhirService should be defined
FhirService publishConsultation() throws when the visit is not found
FhirService publishConsultation() returns a FHIR Bundle of type "collection"
FhirService publishConsultation() includes Patient, Encounter, Composition, and MedicationRequest entries
FhirService publishConsultation() builds the Encounter entry referencing the correct patient
FhirService publishConsultation() sets MedicationRequest status to "active" for FINALIZED prescriptions
FhirService publishConsultation() sets MedicationRequest status to "draft" for non-FINALIZED prescriptions
FhirService publishConsultation() does NOT call HttpService when FHIR_BASE_URL is empty
FhirService publishConsultation() POSTs to FHIR_BASE_URL/Bundle when FHIR_BASE_URL is set
FhirService publishConsultation() does NOT include Authorization header when FHIR_AUTH_TOKEN is empty
FhirService publishConsultation() still returns the bundle even when the HTTP push fails
FhirService publishDischarge() throws when the admission is not found
FhirService publishDischarge() returns a FHIR Bundle containing Patient and Encounter entries
FhirService publishDischarge() includes a Composition entry when a discharge summary exists
FhirService publishDischarge() omits Composition when no discharge summary exists
FhirService publishDischarge() does NOT call HttpService when FHIR_BASE_URL is empty
FhirService publishDischarge() POSTs the bundle when FHIR_BASE_URL is configured
FhirService publishPrescription() throws when the prescription is not found
FhirService publishPrescription() returns a Bundle containing a MedicationRequest resource
FhirService publishPrescription() includes the Patient resource when a patient is found
FhirService publishPrescription() omits Patient resource when patient is not found
FhirService publishPrescription() sets MedicationRequest status "active" for FINALIZED prescription
FhirService publishPrescription() sets MedicationRequest status "draft" for non-FINALIZED prescription
FhirService publishPrescription() does NOT call HttpService when FHIR_BASE_URL is empty
FhirService publishPrescription() persists the FHIR JSON back to the prescription repo
FhirService publishPrescription() POSTs to FHIR server and includes Authorization header when token is set
FhirService Patient resource shape includes name, identifier, telecom and birthDate in the Patient entry
LabService createOrder() throws NotFoundException when patient not found
LabService createOrder() creates an order with ORDERED status and IN_HOUSE partner by default
LabService createOrder() embeds a FHIR ServiceRequest in the order
LabService createOrder() routes to external lab partner in mock mode when partner != IN_HOUSE and no API key
LabService getOrder() returns the lab order when found
LabService getOrder() throws NotFoundException when order not found
LabService addResults() throws NotFoundException when order not found
LabService addResults() saves each result and marks order as RESULTED
LabService addResults() sends SMS notification to patient after results are ready
LabService addResults() appends critical alert to SMS when result has CRITICAL_HIGH status
LabService cancelOrder() sets status to CANCELLED
LabService cancelOrder() throws NotFoundException when order not found
LabService handlePartnerWebhook() routes results via addResults when matching order found
LabService handlePartnerWebhook() silently returns when externalOrderId not found

UsersService should be defined
UsersService createUser() hashes the password and saves a new user
UsersService createUser() throws ConflictException when the email is already taken
UsersService findUserByEmail() returns a user when found by email
UsersService findUserByEmail() returns null when no user matches the email
UsersService findUserByIdOnly() looks up a user by id only (no facilityId constraint)
UsersService findUserByIdOnly() returns null when the user does not exist
UsersService findUserById() returns a user when found by id + facilityId
UsersService findUserById() throws NotFoundException when the user is not found
UsersService findAllUsers() returns all users for a facility
UsersService updateLastLogin() calls repo.update with a recent Date for lastLoginAt
UsersService updateUser() merges the DTO into the existing user and saves it
UsersService updateUser() throws NotFoundException when the user does not exist
UsersService removeUser() soft-removes the user via softRemove()
UsersService getDoctors() queries only active DOCTOR-role users for the given facility
UsersService createFacility() creates a facility and auto-creates its default settings
UsersService findFacilityById() returns the facility when found
UsersService findFacilityById() throws NotFoundException when the facility does not exist
UsersService activateFacility() sets isActive=true and approvalStatus=ACTIVE, then saves
UsersService activateFacility() throws NotFoundException when the facility does not exist
UsersService suspendFacility() sets isActive=false and approvalStatus=SUSPENDED, then saves
UsersService getFacilitySettings() returns existing settings without creating a new record
UsersService getFacilitySettings() creates and saves default settings when none exist
UsersService updateFacilitySettings() merges DTO fields into existing settings and saves
UsersService uploadFacilityLogo() updates the logoUrl on the facility and saves
CrmService createFollowUp() creates and saves a follow-up with facilityId
CrmService createFollowUp() converts scheduledDate string to Date and stores as followUpDate
CrmService createFollowUp() throws NotFoundException when patient does not exist
CrmService getFollowUps() returns all follow-ups for a facility with no filters
CrmService getFollowUps() applies status filter when provided
CrmService getFollowUps() applies patientId filter when provided
CrmService getFollowUps() applies date range filter when date provided
CrmService createSegment() creates and saves a segment with facilityId
CrmService createSegment() uses empty object as default criteria when not provided
CrmService createSegment() uses provided criteria when present
CrmService createCampaign() creates and saves a campaign with facilityId
CrmService createCampaign() converts scheduledAt string to Date when provided
CrmService createCampaign() leaves scheduledAt undefined when not provided
CrmService updateFollowUp() throws NotFoundException when follow-up does not exist
CrmService updateFollowUp() sets completedAt when status is COMPLETED
CrmService updateFollowUp() updates notes when provided
EventsGateway should be defined
EventsGateway exposes the correct handler methods
EventsGateway afterInit() completes without throwing
EventsGateway handleConnection() disconnects a client that sends no token
EventsGateway handleConnection() accepts a client with a valid JWT and joins the facility room
EventsGateway handleConnection() disconnects a client whose JWT is invalid
EventsGateway handleConnection() does not call join() when payload has no facilityId
EventsGateway handleConnection() uses the token from handshake.query.token when handshake.auth.token is absent
EventsGateway handleDisconnect() completes without throwing for a normal disconnect
EventsGateway handleJoinQueue() joins the correct queue room and returns the ack payload
EventsGateway handleJoinBedBoard() joins the correct beds room and returns the ack payload
EventsGateway handleJoinUserRoom() joins the user room when the socket user matches the requested userId
EventsGateway handleJoinUserRoom() does NOT join the user room when userId does not match socket user
EventsGateway handleJoinUserRoom() returns { event: "user:joined" }
EventsGateway emitQueueUpdate() broadcasts to the facility room with event "queue:updated"
EventsGateway emitTokenCalled() broadcasts to the facility room with event "queue:token-called"
EventsGateway emitBedStatusChanged() broadcasts to the facility room with event "beds:status-changed"
EventsGateway emitCriticalAlert() broadcasts to the facility room with event "alert:critical-vitals"
EventsGateway emitOtUpdate() broadcasts to the facility room with event "ot:updated"
EventsGateway emitUserNotification() broadcasts to the user-specific room with event "notification:received"
EventsGateway broadcast isolation targets different facility rooms for different facilityIds
AbdmService generateAadhaarOtp() — sandbox mode (no ABDM_CLIENT_ID) throws NotFoundException when patient is not found
AbdmService generateAadhaarOtp() — sandbox mode (no ABDM_CLIENT_ID) creates an AbdmRecord with INITIATED status and returns a mock txnId
AbdmService generateAadhaarOtp() — sandbox mode (no ABDM_CLIENT_ID) updates the AbdmRecord status to OTP_SENT with a generated txnId
AbdmService verifyAadhaarOtpAndCreateAbha() — sandbox mode throws BadRequestException when no matching transaction record is found
AbdmService verifyAadhaarOtpAndCreateAbha() — sandbox mode updates AbdmRecord to LINKED and writes ABHA to patient record in sandbox mode
AbdmService verifyAadhaarOtpAndCreateAbha() — sandbox mode enqueues DHIS processing after successful ABHA creation
AbdmService initiateM2Link() — sandbox mode throws NotFoundException when patient does not exist
AbdmService initiateM2Link() — sandbox mode creates M2_KYC_LINK record and returns mock txnId
AbdmService requestConsent() — sandbox mode throws NotFoundException when patient does not exist
AbdmService requestConsent() — sandbox mode throws BadRequestException when patient has no ABHA number
AbdmService requestConsent() — sandbox mode creates M3_HIU_CONSENT record and auto-grants consent in sandbox mode
AbdmService getPatientAbdmHistory() returns ABDM records sorted by createdAt DESC
NotificationService send() — SMS channel creates a NotificationLog record with QUEUED status
NotificationService send() — SMS channel routes to QueueService.enqueueSms for SMS channel
NotificationService send() — SMS channel returns the saved log record
NotificationService send() — EMAIL channel routes to QueueService.enqueueEmail for EMAIL channel
NotificationService send() — EMAIL channel uses default subject when templateCode is absent
NotificationService send() — WHATSAPP channel routes to QueueService.enqueueWhatsApp for WHATSAPP channel
NotificationService send() — WHATSAPP channel falls back to general_notification templateCode when none provided
NotificationService send() — PUSH channel does NOT call any queue service method for PUSH channel
NotificationService send() — PUSH channel marks log as SENT via logRepo.update for PUSH channel
NotificationService renderTemplate() replaces known variables in the template
NotificationService renderTemplate() keeps placeholder intact when variable is missing
NotificationService renderTemplate() replaces multiple occurrences of the same variable
NotificationService createTemplate() creates and saves a notification template
NhcxService createClaim() throws NotFoundException when patient not found
NhcxService createClaim() creates a claim with DRAFT status and embedded FHIR bundle
NhcxService createClaim() embeds a FHIR ClaimBundle with Claim and Patient resources
NhcxService submitClaim() — sandbox mode throws NotFoundException when claim does not exist

NhcxService updateClaimStatus() throws NotFoundException when claim not found

NhcxService updateClaimStatus() does NOT set resolvedAt for QUERY_RAISED status
NhcxService handleNhcxWebhook() maps APPROVED webhook status to NhcxClaimStatus.APPROVED
NhcxService handleNhcxWebhook() maps DENIED webhook status to NhcxClaimStatus.DENIED
NhcxService handleNhcxWebhook() maps PARTIALLY_APPROVED webhook status correctly
NhcxService handleNhcxWebhook() silently ignores webhook for unknown claimId
NhcxService handleNhcxWebhook() ignores unknown status strings

NhcxService getClaim() throws NotFoundException when claim not found
OperationsCrmService createShift creates and saves a staff roster entry with facilityId

NurseService recordVitals() computes BMI from weight and height

NurseService recordVitals() omits BMI when weight or height is missing

OtService create throws BadRequestException when scheduledEnd is before scheduledStart

QueueService should be defined
QueueService enqueueSms() adds a send-sms job to the notifications queue with high priority
QueueService enqueueSms() returns the job object from the queue
QueueService enqueueSms() does NOT route to the FHIR or DHIS queue
QueueService enqueueEmail() adds a send-email job to the notifications queue with priority 2
QueueService enqueueWhatsApp() adds a send-whatsapp job to the notifications queue with priority 2
QueueService enqueueConsultationPublish() adds a publish-consultation job to the FHIR queue with a 2-second delay
QueueService enqueueDischargePublish() adds a publish-discharge job to the FHIR queue without delay
QueueService enqueuePrescriptionPublish() adds a publish-prescription job to the FHIR queue with a 1-second delay
QueueService enqueueAbhaLinkageProcessing() adds a process-abha-linkage job to the DHIS queue
QueueService enqueueMonthlyDhisCompute() adds a compute-monthly-dhis job to the DHIS queue with the facilityId wrapped
QueueService enqueueFollowUpGeneration() adds a generate-followups job to the CRM queue
QueueService enqueueCampaignSend() adds a send-campaign job to the CRM queue with campaignId and facilityId
QueueService enqueueChurnScoring() adds a churn-scoring job to the CRM queue
QueueService queue isolation notification jobs never reach the FHIR, DHIS or CRM queues
QueueService queue isolation FHIR jobs never reach the notifications, DHIS or CRM queues

AppController root should return health and system info
RedisService should be defined
RedisService blacklistToken() stores the JTI with the correct prefixed key and TTL
RedisService blacklistToken() does not throw when Redis throws (degraded mode)
RedisService isTokenBlacklisted() returns true when the blacklist key holds "1"
RedisService isTokenBlacklisted() returns false when the key does not exist (null)
RedisService isTokenBlacklisted() returns false (fail-open) when Redis throws
RedisService set() calls redis.set when no TTL is provided
RedisService set() calls redis.setex when a TTL is provided
RedisService set() does not throw when Redis throws (degraded mode)
RedisService get() returns the stored value
RedisService get() returns null when the key is missing
RedisService get() returns null when Redis throws (degraded mode)
RedisService del() calls redis.del with the correct key
RedisService del() does not throw when Redis throws (degraded mode)
RedisService setJson() serialises the value to JSON and delegates to set()
RedisService getJson() deserialises a stored JSON string back to an object
RedisService getJson() returns null when the key is missing
RedisService getJson() returns null when the stored string is not valid JSON
RedisService increment() increments the counter and sets the TTL on the first call (count === 1)
RedisService increment() increments but does NOT reset TTL on subsequent calls (count > 1)
RedisService increment() returns 0 (safe fallback) when Redis throws
RedisService publish() publishes a message to the correct channel
RedisService publish() does not throw when Redis throws (degraded mode)
RedisService isHealthy() returns true when ping responds with "PONG"
RedisService isHealthy() returns false when ping responds with an unexpected value
RedisService isHealthy() returns false when Redis throws
AuthService login() returns accessToken, refreshToken and user profile on valid credentials

AuthService login() throws UnauthorizedException when user is inactive

AuthService login() does not call updateLastLogin when password fails
AuthService logout() revokes all refresh tokens for the user

AuthService logout() skips Redis blacklist when no access token is supplied
AuthService registerFacility() creates a facility, settings and admin user on success
AuthService registerFacility() throws ConflictException if admin email is already registered
AuthService requestOtp() invalidates old OTPs, saves a hashed new OTP and enqueues an SMS

AuthService verifyOtp() throws BadRequestException when OTP has expired
AuthService verifyOtp() throws BadRequestException when code is incorrect
AuthService verifyOtp() throws BadRequestException when no OTPs exist for that phone
AuthService verifyOtp() skips OTPs that have already reached 3 attempts
AuthService acceptInvite() activates the user and clears the invite token on success
AuthService acceptInvite() throws UnauthorizedException when invite token is invalid
AuthService acceptInvite() throws BadRequestException when invite token has expired
AuthService changePassword() hashes the new password and revokes all refresh tokens
AuthService changePassword() throws BadRequestException when current password is wrong
AuthService changePassword() throws BadRequestException when new password equals current password
AuthService changePassword() throws UnauthorizedException when user is not found
